seoTitle: Harcourt vs Harkaway — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Harcourt and Harkaway. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Harcourt and Harkaway.
heading: Harcourt vs Harkaway — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Harcourt, Victoria and Harkaway, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Harkaway has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Harcourt (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Harcourt or Harkaway safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Harcourt has a flood risk score of 58/100, while Harkaway scores 33/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Harcourt scores 35/100 for bushfire risk. Harkaway scores 61/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Harcourt or Harkaway?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Harkaway has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.48% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
